import pytest

def test_snake_to_camel_happy_path_single_underscore():
    """Happy path: Basic snake_case with one underscore."""
    assert snake_to_camel("hello_world") == "helloWorld"

def test_snake_to_camel_happy_path_multiple_underscores():
    """Happy path: Multiple parts in snake_case."""
    assert snake_to_camel("hello_world_case") == "helloWorldCase"

def test_snake_to_camel_happy_path_mixed_case_input():
    """Happy path: Input with mixed case in snake parts."""
    assert snake_to_camel("hello_WORLD_123") == "helloWorld123"

def test_snake_to_camel_edge_case_single_word():
    """Edge case: No underscores (already camel-like)."""
    assert snake_to_camel("hello") == "hello"

def test_snake_to_camel_edge_case_empty_string():
    """Edge case: Empty string."""
    assert snake_to_camel("") == ""

def test_snake_to_camel_edge_case_all_underscores():
    """Edge case: String consisting only of underscores."""
    assert snake_to_camel("___") == ""

def test_snake_to_camel_edge_case_leading_underscore():
    """Edge case: Leading underscore."""
    assert snake_to_camel("_hello") == "Hello"

def test_snake_to_camel_edge_case_trailing_underscore():
    """Edge case: Trailing underscore."""
    assert snake_to_camel("hello_") == "hello"

def test_snake_to_camel_edge_case_double_underscore():
    """Edge case: Consecutive underscores (empty part)."""
    assert snake_to_camel("hello__world") == "helloWorld"

def test_snake_to_camel_edge_case_numbers_and_special_chars():
    """Edge case: Includes numbers and assumes special chars are preserved."""
    assert snake_to_camel("hello_world_123_test!") == "helloWorld123Test!"

def test_snake_to_camel_error_case_non_string_input():
    """Error case: Non-string input should raise TypeError."""
    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
        snake_to_camel(123)  # int

def test_snake_to_camel_error_case_none_input():
    """Error case: None input should raise TypeError."""
    with pytest.raises(TypeError):
        snake_to_camel(None)
